ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (ISNEW() || ISCHANGED(Website)) && NOT(ISCHANGED(Stage__c)) && ISBLANK( Website ) && $Profile.Name <> "BI Dev" && $Profile.Name <> "Infer API" && $Profile.Name <> "Integration User" && $Profile.Name <> "Integration User No DF" && $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator" && $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps Extended" && $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps" && $Profile.Name <> "SW Wolves"
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You must fill the Website field
